subject: Recovery
details:
Week 1 focus: Post-training recovery
Longer holds after hard sessions

Session structure:
• Breath & warm (2 min) — Easy nasal breathing, neck and shoulder rolls
• Lower body (6 min) — Hip flexor, hamstring, calf, figure-4 stretch
• Core & spine (4 min) — Cat-cow, child's pose, gentle twist
• Close (3 min) — Hold any tight area; slow breath

Instagram drill library:
• https://www.instagram.com/reel/DW_zewYkeet/

Theme focus: mobility, flexibility, recovery, hip and hamstring openness, breath work

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 1 focus: Trapping & cushioning
Air balls, thigh/chest/foot traps, settle into touch

Session structure:
• Activation (8 min) — Light touches, toe taps, ball rolls
• Technical block A (14 min) — Repeatable pattern — same skill, both feet
• Technical block B (14 min) — Add pressure or tempo — still same theme
• Challenge (10 min) — Max reps clean touches or timed circuit
• Cooldown (4 min) — Juggling or free touches

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 4 focus: Turn library
Inside hook, outside hook, pull-back turn — same line of cones

Session structure:
• Warm-up (8 min) — Ball familiarity, light touches
• Skill learn (12 min) — One move — slow, both feet, no pressure
• Skill rep (15 min) — Same move — reps, then add cone or marker
• Link moves (10 min) — Chain 2–3 skills or turn + pass
• Freestyle minute (5 min) — Experiment — no wrong answers

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 4 focus: Mixed circuit
Rotate 4 stations — 3 rounds quality over speed

Session structure:
• Movement prep (10 min) — Dynamic stretch, A-skips, ankle hops
• Power block A (12 min) — Broad jumps, squat jumps — quality landings
• Power block B (12 min) — Lateral bounds, single-leg hops
• Agility circuit (12 min) — Low box or cone hops + sprint trigger
• Cooldown (4 min) — Walk, breathe, light stretch
